description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a sturdy, double-looped handle made from light-colored, natural wicker. The basket's body features a vibrant pattern of alternating purple and pink bands, with a thicker dark blue band running along the base and a lighter, cream-colored rim at the top. The weave is tight and uniform, providing both structural integrity and a decorative appearance. The handle is attached at two points on each side, reinforced with additional wicker wrappings for durability. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible lining or compartments. There is no lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents easily accessible from above.
description: A rectangular, woven picnic basket with a double-looped wicker handle and a vibrant purple, pink, and blue pattern. The basket is open-topped and features a sturdy, decorative weave.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, double handle, and decorative purple and pink weave pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the basket's depth and the open, unobstructed interior.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same handle and weave pattern visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the basket's depth and open interior.
attribute_handle_type: Double-looped, hinged handles made of bent wicker, attached at two points on each side with reinforced wrappings.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with horizontal bands of color; uniform and decorative with no open gaps.
